name: ASRock B650M PG LIGHTNING Micro-ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x16 - M.2 Key E for WiFi - Support DDR5-7200+(OC) - 3x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2 Type-C+A - HDMI 2.1 - DisplayPort 1.4 - Phantom Gaming 2.5G LAN

description: Micro-ATX gaming motherboard for AM5 socket with PCIe 4.0, high DDR5 support, and gaming features.
